DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER ESTABLISHING ADMISSIONS IS DENIED AS PLAINTIFF SERVED RESPONSES ON JANUARY 14, 2005. FAILURE TO SERVE TIMELY RESPONSES NECESSITATING THE BRINGING OF THE INSTANT MOTION WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT $561.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. BRUCE E. CHAN.
